goal: Rename /gad-update → /gad-framework-update AND add new /gad-cli-update. Current /gad-update only updates Surface 4 (skills/workflows/hooks in consumer runtime config dirs) but the name implies it updates Surface 1 (gad.exe binary on PATH). Confusion called out in install/update review 2026-04-22. Action: (1) rename skill dir vendor/get-anything-done/skills/gad-update/ → skills/gad-framework-update/ + workflow file, update frontmatter name, (2) author new skill skills/gad-cli-update/ that fetches newer gad.exe via gh release download + runs 'gad install self' or 'install-gad-windows.ps1 -Artifact <path>', (3) add a 'gad update' CLI dispatcher subcommand (not a skill, a real CLI verb in bin/commands/) that routes to either framework or cli update based on arg ('gad update framework' vs 'gad update cli' vs 'gad update all'), (4) update SessionStart hook gad-check-update.js to check both surfaces independently + report separately, (5) update CLAUDE.md + any cross-refs in other skills, (6) handle legacy /gad-update alias for backwards compat during transition period.
